FX.title: USD/JPY Accelerates Toward 155 as Geopolitical Risk and Fed Hawkishness Converge
tldr_points: UAE-Hormuz tensions elevate energy risk premium, boosting USD safe-haven flows
PBOC's firm CNY midpoint (6.9025) signals deliberate USD resilience in Asian FX
Japan's Tankan forward gloom delays BOJ tightening expectations, removing JPY support
FX.excerpt: Catalyst-driven USD strength and technical momentum setup point to a decisive USD/JPY breakout toward 155.
FX.comment: Geopolitical risk, PBOC's firm USD stance, and delayed BOJ expectations drive a catalyst-backed breakout above 154.50.

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 at Inflection: Institutional Flow Signals Breakout Above 5,600
tldr_points: Price held above key 20-day MA (5,520) establishing bullish momentum base.
RSI(14) holds >60, indicating sustained buying pressure without immediate overbought signal.
Breakout above 5,580-5,600 resistance zone targets measured move to 5,750.
Failure to maintain 5,520 invalidates thesis, risks retest of 5,450 support.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 forms bullish continuation pattern above 20-day MA with RSI confirmation, targeting 5,750 on sustained breakout.
STOCKS.comment: Breakout above 5,600 confirmed with RSI >60 and institutional accumulation signals measured move to 5,750.

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Institutional Tactical Alert: Regulatory and Quantum Pressures Mount as Technicals Idle
tldr_points: Fed Barr calls for strong stablecoin oversight, signaling increased regulatory scrutiny
Google's quantum breakthrough reignites Bitcoin security debate, long-term risk perception rises
TD Cowen pessimistic on crypto bill passage, legislative uncertainty weighs on sentiment
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC faces headwinds from regulatory and quantum concerns; technicals unclear. Institutional sentiment cautious.
CRYPTO.comment: Insufficient technical data to generate a signal; fundamental catalysts mixed.
